primary_text:
When did we stop knowing where our food comes from?

Somewhere between the paddock and the plastic tray, we lost the connection. No farm name. No farmer's face. Just a barcode and a best-before date.

FarmThru is rebuilding that link. Every product traces to a named regenerative farm in NSW. Bundarra Farm pork. Farmer Brown eggs. Collins Wild Caught salmon.

You collect it fresh from the Brookvale hub. Days old, not weeks.

We'll show you where your food comes from. Literally.
headline: When did we stop knowing our farmers?
description: Every product traces to a named farm. Collected fresh from the Brookvale hub.
creative_brief: Side-by-side: anonymous barcode on plastic-wrapped meat vs hand-written farm label on brown paper. Warm light on the right, cool fluorescent on the left.
